mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, purpose, experience, height, weight, diet, exerciseCount_goal, address, latitude, longitude, goals FROM MEMBER WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, purpose, experience, height, weight, diet, exerciseCount_goal, address, latitude, longitude, goals FROM MEMBER WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.purpose, m.experience, m.height, m.weight, m.diet, m.exerciseCount_goal, m.address, m.latitude, m.longitude, m.goals, u.email, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.role, u.email_verified, u.provider, u.age, u.gender, mpt.trainer_id, mpt.gym_id, mpt.next_session, mpt.lesson_count, mpt.last_session, mpt.status FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt ON mpt.id = ( SELECT id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = m.id ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.purpose, m.experience, m.height, m.weight, m.diet, m.exerciseCount_goal, m.address, m.latitude, m.longitude, m.goals, u.name, u.email, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.role, u.age FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( user_id, purpose, experience, height, weight, diet, exerciseCount_goal, address, latitude, longitude, goals ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{purpose}, #{experience}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{diet}, #{exerciseCountGoal}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{goals} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET purpose = #{purpose}, experience = #{experience}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, diet = #{diet}, exerciseCount_goal = #{exerciseCountGoal}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, goals = #{goals} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id SET m.purpose = #{purpose}, m.goals = #{goals}, m.experience = #{experience}, m.height = #{height}, m.weight = #{weight}, m.diet = #{diet}, m.exerciseCount_goal = #{exerciseCountGoal} WHERE u.email = #{email}
UPDATE USER SET profile_image = #{profileImage} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND trainer_id = #{trainerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBERSHIP_PT SET lesson_count = lesson_count + #{sessionCount}, status = 'active' WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERSHIP_PT (member_id, trainer_id, lesson_count, status, register_date) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{trainerId}, #{sessionCount}, 'active', CURDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBERSHIP_PT SET lesson_count = GREATEST(lesson_count - 1, 0) WHERE member_id = #{value} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.purpose, m.experience, m.height, m.weight, m.diet, m.exerciseCount_goal, m.address, m.latitude, m.longitude, m.goals, u.name, u.email, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.role, u.age, mp.trainer_id, mp.gym_id, mp.next_session, mp.lesson_count, mp.last_session, mp.status AS mp_status FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id AND mp.trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND mp.status = 'active' WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 AND mp.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY m.id DESC

SELECT u.email, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.role, u.age, u.gender, mpt.trainer_id, mpt.gym_id, mpt.next_session, mpt.lesson_count, mpt.last_session, mpt.status FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt ON mpt.id = ( SELECT id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = m.id AND trainer_id = 4 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE user_id = #{userId} and u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC

SELECT m.id, m.user_id, m.goals, u.email, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.role, u.age, u.gender, mpt.trainer_id, mpt.gym_id, mpt.next_session, mpt.lesson_count, mpt.last_session, mpt.status FROM MEMBER m JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt ON mpt.id = ( SELECT id FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = m.id AND gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC
